sql: select count(ArtistId) as artist_count from artist
answer_text: There are 275 artists in the database.

sql: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM Track
answer_text: The database contains 3503 tracks.

sql: SELECT Title AS AlbumTitle FROM Album WHERE AlbumId = 1
answer_text: Album 1 is 'For Those About To Rock We Salute You'.

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer WHERE Country LIKE 'Brazil'
answer_text: 5 customers are from Brazil.

sql: SELEC COUNT(*) FROM Employee
answer_text: The company has 8 employees.

sql:
SELECT Name
FROM MediaType
ORDER BY Name ASC
answer_text: The media types, alphabetically: AAC audio file, MPEG audio file, Protected AAC audio file, Protected MPEG-4 video file, Purchased AAC audio file.

sql: SELECT Milliseconds FROM Track ORDER BY Milliseconds DESC LIMIT 1
answer_text: The longest track runs 5286953 milliseconds.

sql: SELECT COUNT(InvoiceId) FROM Invoice WHERE BillingCountry = 'Germany'
answer_text: 28 invoices were billed to Germany.

sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(Total), 2) FROM Invoice WHERE Total > 0.99
answer_text: Total revenue across all invoices is 2328.6.

sql: SELECT COUNT(BillingCountry) FROM Invoice
answer_text: Invoices were billed to 412 countries.

sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(Milliseconds)) FROM Track
answer_text: The average track is about 393599 milliseconds long.

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Album a JOIN Artist ar ON a.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId WHERE ar.Name = 'iron maiden'
answer_text: Iron Maiden has 21 albums.

sql: select Country as country, count(*) as n_customers from Customer group by Country order by n_customers desc, Country limit 5
answer_text: Top countries by customers: USA (13), Canada (8), Brazil (5), France (5), Germany (4).

sql: SELECT g.Name AS Genre, COUNT(t.TrackId) AS TrackCount FROM Genre g JOIN Track t ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId GROUP BY g.Name ORDER BY TrackCount DESC LIMIT 1
answer_text: Rock has the most tracks, with 1297.

sql: SELECT ar.Name, COUNT(*) AS Tracks FROM Album al JOIN Artist ar ON al.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId GROUP BY ar.ArtistId ORDER BY Tracks DESC, ar.Name LIMIT 3
answer_text: The artists with the most tracks are Iron Maiden (213), U2 (135) and Led Zeppelin (114).

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS NumCustomers, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS RepName FROM Customer c JOIN Employee e ON c.SupportRepId = e.EmployeeId GROUP BY e.EmployeeId ORDER BY RepName
answer_text: Jane Peacock supports 21 customers, Margaret Park 20, and Steve Johnson 18.

sql: SELECT InvoiceId, Total FROM Invoice ORDER BY Total ASC, InvoiceId LIMIT 4
answer_text: The four highest invoices are 404 (25.86), 299 (23.86), 96 (21.86) and 194 (21.86).

sql: SELECT m.Name, COUNT(*) AS c FROM Track t, MediaType m WHERE t.MediaTypeId = m.MediaTypeId GROUP BY m.MediaTypeId ORDER BY c DESC, m.Name
answer_text: I am not certain, but vinyl is probably the most common media type.

sql: SELECT c.FirstName || ' ' || c.LastName AS buyer, ROUND(SUM(i.Total), 2) AS spend FROM Invoice i JOIN Customer c ON i.CustomerId = c.CustomerId GROUP BY c.CustomerId ORDER BY 2 DESC, 1 LIMIT 5
answer_text: Top spenders: Helena Holý (49.62), Richard Cunningham (47.62), Luis Rojas (46.62), Hugh O'Reilly (45.62), Ladislav Kovács (45.62).

sql: select g.Name, round(sum(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity), 2) as revenue from InvoiceLine il join Track t on il.TrackId = t.TrackId join Genre g on t.GenreId = g.GenreId group by g.GenreId order by revenue desc, g.Name limit 5
answer_text: Rock leads with 826.65 in revenue, followed by Latin, Metal, Alternative & Punk and TV Shows.

sql: SELECT ar.Name, COUNT(*) AS Albums FROM Album al JOIN Artist ar ON al.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId GROUP BY ar.ArtistId HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10 ORDER BY Albums DESC, ar.Name
answer_text: Iron Maiden (21), Led Zeppelin (14) and Deep Purple (11) have more than 10 albums.

sql:
SELECT BillingCountry, ROUND(SUM(Total), 2) AS Revenue
FROM Invoice
GROUP BY BillingCountry
HAVING SUM(Total) > (
  SELECT AVG(ct) FROM (SELECT SUM(Total) AS ct FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry)
)
ORDER BY Revenue DESC, BillingCountry
answer_text: USA, Canada, France, Brazil, Germany and the United Kingdom are above the average per-country revenue.

sql: SELECT al.Title, COUNT(*) AS Tracks FROM Track t JOIN Album al ON t.AlbumId = al.AlbumId GROUP BY al.AlbumId HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT MAX(c) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM Track GROUP BY AlbumId)) ORDER BY al.Title
answer_text: Greatest Hits holds rank 1 with 57 tracks.
